## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Payment and security impact

Explain effects on verification, amounts, references, state transitions, idempotency, callbacks, credentials, refunds, and channel isolation. Write “None” only when genuinely unrelated.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Tests cover success and failure behavior
- [ ] No credentials, customer data, private provider documents, or production transaction details are included
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Breaking changes and migrations are clearly identified

## Provider documentation

Link to official documentation used by this change, if applicable.
